body:
* \[[`d46c3485c9`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/d46c3485c9)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **perf(propagation)**: rewrite tracestate parser to be linear (Ruben Bridgewater) [#8256](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8256)
* \[[`ed087ea187`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/ed087ea187)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **chore(deps-dev)**: bump the dev-minor-and-patch-dependencies group across 1 directory with 2 updates (dependabot\[bot]) [#8258](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8258)
* \[[`d0eba220a0`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/d0eba220a0)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **chore(deps)**: bump the gh-actions-packages group across 2 directories with 1 update (dependabot\[bot]) [#8261](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8261)
* \[[`33b0dc1e17`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/33b0dc1e17)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **fix(express)**: use the host's path-to-regexp dialect for route tagging (Ruben Bridgewater) [#8224](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8224)
* \[[`d064e062cf`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/d064e062cf)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **refactor(otel)**: extract bridge helpers into span-helpers.js (Ruben Bridgewater) [#8220](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8220)
* \[[`658450e18b`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/658450e18b)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **fix(otel)**: return a non-recording span when the inner tracer is the noop (Ruben Bridgewater) [#8218](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8218)
* \[[`fe48fc0c5f`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/fe48fc0c5f)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **fix(esm)**: expose 'tracer' as an ESM named export (Ruben Bridgewater) [#8216](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8216)
* \[[`90bb04871a`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/90bb04871a)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **fix**: small correctness issues in mongodb-core and bullmq (Ruben Bridgewater) [#8228](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8228)
* \[[`20f9e76efe`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/20f9e76efe)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **fix(config)**: align inferred service name with agent normalization (Ruben Bridgewater) [#8217](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8217)
* \[[`00a239a1e2`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/00a239a1e2)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **fix(propagation)**: enforce baggageMax\* caps on extract (Ruben Bridgewater) [#8255](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8255)
* \[[`15ce029c26`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/15ce029c26)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **ci**: deprecate legacy macrobenchmarks in favor of parallel ones (Fayssal DEFAA) [#8250](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8250)
* \[[`9e6acd8951`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/9e6acd8951)] - **(SEMVER-MINOR)** **feat(test-optimization)**: create final\_status tag on test event for playwright (Sebastián Kay) [#8190](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8190)
* \[[`77cc2e065d`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/77cc2e065d)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **fix(hono)**: skip publishing when env.incoming is missing (Ruben Bridgewater) [#8221](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8221)
* \[[`c832bf7a10`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/c832bf7a10)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** \[test optimization] Update extraction of runner diagnostic dir using glob pattern matching (Sebastián Kay) [#8115](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8115)
* \[[`41789b4087`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/41789b4087)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **refactor(config)**: drop more internalPropertyName aliases (Ruben Bridgewater) [#8237](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8237)
* \[[`c97a177432`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/c97a177432)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **fix(encode)**: write truncated meta keys back to span.meta (Ruben Bridgewater) [#8236](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8236)
* \[[`e5e3e4d35b`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/e5e3e4d35b)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **test**: drop keep-alive on the ci-visibility web-app-server (Ruben Bridgewater) [#8194](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8194)
* \[[`6448470089`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/6448470089)] - **(SEMVER-MINOR)** \[test-optimization] Honor attempt-to-fix failures (Juan Antonio Fernández de Alba) [#8138](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8138)
* \[[`925bd0aae7`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/925bd0aae7)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **chore(deps)**: bump openai (dependabot\[bot]) [#8244](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8244)
* \[[`b058d8b4af`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/b058d8b4af)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **ci**: remove old bundle-validate workflow (Roch Devost) [#8214](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8214)
* \[[`e199f82b3e`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/e199f82b3e)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **ci**: update all green script to fail when any retry failed (Roch Devost) [#8222](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8222)
* \[[`d109d5bf1b`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/d109d5bf1b)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **chore(codeowners)**: own remaining benchmark dirs and enforce in CI (Ruben Bridgewater) [#8204](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8204)
